parameter.description: soil moisture content at wilting point (pF= 4.2)
soil moisture content at field capacity (pF= 2.3)
critical soil air content for aeration
soil moisture content in initial root zone at planting or emergence
initial soil moisture content in lower zone at planting or emergence
maximum rooting depth as determined by soil structure
average fraction of precipitation lost by runoff
correction factor of time course of soil evaporation (value between 1 and about 4)
maximal percolation rate from lower zone to deeper soil layers
